metadata.title: Privacy Policy
metadata.description: Learn how Billix collects, uses, and protects your personal data. We are committed to transparency and safeguarding your privacy.

heading.title: Privacy policy
heading.description: We explain what information we collect, how it’s used, and the choices you have to control and protect your personal data.

metadata.title: Terms of Service
metadata.description: Review the terms and conditions for using Billix. These terms outline your rights, responsibilities, and acceptable use of our AI workspace platform.

heading.title: Terms of service
heading.description: These terms outline your rights and responsibilities when using our services, including acceptable use and account obligations.
